chapters.title: The Local Legend
chapters.content: During his vacation, Daniel heard stories about a secret cave hidden near the cliffs. Locals said nobody could find it twice.

chapters.title: Following the Trail
chapters.content: With only a small map and curiosity, Daniel followed a narrow path through the forest until he reached the rocky coast.

chapters.title: Treasure of Silence
chapters.content: Inside the cave, there was no treasure chest—only silence, clear water, and sunlight reflecting on the walls. It was more beautiful than gold.
